per_question.question_text: Can you explain the difference between a LEFT JOIN and an INNER JOIN in SQL, and give me a simple business scenario where you'd choose one over the other?
per_question.answer_text: तो basically जो inner join होता है में That Returns only the record दैट हैव मिसिंग वैल्यूज इन बोथ टेबल मतलब दोनों टेबल में से तो मिसिंग वैल्यूज है। वो show करता है। पर जो left join होता है, That returns all records from the left table and matching records from the right table. If there is no match नल वैल्यूज आर रिटन फॉर द राइट टेबल कॉलम्स। हां, right table वाला होगा। और ये business scenario में इस तरीके से हो जाता है जैसे कि marketing teams often use left joins To identify inactive customers for re-engagement campaigns.
per_question.fix: practice answering in a single language for consistency

per_question.question_text: Your resume mentions your work at KAS Marine contributed to a 5% improvement in fuel efficiency recommendations. Can you walk me through exactly how you analyzed the vessel performance data and what specific trend you found that led to this recommendation?
per_question.answer_text: ओह मेरी internship जब के Time पे। नहीं I analyze vessels operation data including voice duration. Speed Fuel Consumption and Route Details. पहले मैंने data को clean किया, Duplicate values remove हुए। Handling Missing Values and Standardizing Units Excel और Power BI को use करके। Then I created dashboards to analyze fuel consumption across routes and vessel types. और then I discovered that certain vessels operating above optimal speed consistently Consume disproportionality higher field. By highlighting these trends, I recommending maintaining speed With an optimal range Then the team was able to improve fuel efficiency by 5%.
per_question.fix: Consider using SQL for data manipulation and analysis to enhance insights

per_question.question_text: Our JD and your resume both mention SQL window functions. Can you tell me about a time you used a window function, like RANK() or LAG(), to answer a specific business question that would have been difficult to solve otherwise?
per_question.answer_text: मैंने ये जो functions है window function That I have used in my projects of RCB IPL auctions. in which I use the rank window function to rank Batsman Based on total runs Sports each season. This help identify top performer season wise. और जो lag Function है। That I use तो compare current season performance with With previous season which would have been difficult using traditional joints. तो इस तरीके से मैंने ये 2 Windows function use किए थे।
per_question.develop: Providing more technical details and specific business questions answered
per_question.fix: Practice explaining technical concepts in English to improve clarity and concision

per_question.question_text: In Excel, what's the purpose of a Pivot Table, and can you walk me through the basic steps to create one from a raw dataset?
per_question.answer_text: हम्म pure tables जो है वो help करता है summarize, analyze and explore large data sets. Quickly without Outwriting formulas. For example अगर हमारे पास sales का data है। है। containing date, product, Product Region and Revenue तो उसको हम instantly Instantly see total sales by region or monthly trend. तो इसको create करने का बहुत ही आसान तरीका है। है। जैसे कि Select the data set Go to Insert Power Tables Choose the data range and location Drag fields into rows, column, values, filters. Customer segregation such as sum, count और average. This Hello Quick Quick Business Analyze with Minimal Efforts.

per_question.question_text: In your KAS Marine internship, your resume lists '[Excel / Power BI / Tableau]' for the dashboards you developed. Which specific tool did you primarily use, and why was that tool chosen for visualizing KPIs like voyage duration and route efficiency?
per_question.answer_text: तो मैंने basically Power भी है को use किया था। because it was Because it it handle large data set efficiently. It offers indirect Active Dashboards जैसे कि आपको simply Visualize कर सकते सकते हैं। Stakeholders could filter and drill down into KPIs. We provided Easy Integration with Excel File. KPI such as watch duration, route efficiency and full consumption. तो वो सब मैंने 1 1 Card Cards, Line Charts, Bar Cards and Slicers. में दिखाया था। तुम to make Interactive Analyzing.

per_question.question_text: The job description mentions SQL subqueries. Can you describe a situation where using a subquery would be more effective than using a JOIN?
per_question.answer_text: सब सब क्यूरी इज यूजफुल व्हेन द रिजल्ट ऑफ वन क्यूरी इज नीडल टू फिल्टर। Another query. Example Example जो कि है मतलब मतलब employees earning above average salary. तो जॉइंग को use करके We would be unnecessarily complex. सब queries make such compression simpler and more readable.
per_question.develop: provide clear and concise SQL examples, avoid using filler words or phrases
per_question.fix: practice explaining technical concepts in a straightforward and easy-to-understand manner, without relying on vague statements or translations

per_question.question_text: Tell me about the main components of a Power BI dashboard. What's the difference between a report and a dashboard in that context?
per_question.answer_text: तो RBI के main जो component है वो बहुत सारे हैं। हैं जैसे कि visualizations 2nd data sets, 3rd reports, 4th Tiles फिर Dashboard Dashboards and Filters and Slicers. This is the main components Power भी है। तो जो difference है reports of RBI में वो है a report consist of multiple pages with Interactive Visuals. और जो dashboard है यह single page overview Created by pinning विजुअल्स फ्रॉम 1 और more रिपोर्ट्स। रिपोर्ट्स आर यूज्ड फॉर डिटेल एनालाइज व्हाईल डैशबोर्ड्स प्रोवाइड्स हाई लेवल केपीएम मॉनिटरिंग। नहीं।

per_question.fix: practice explaining technical concepts in English for better clarity

per_question.question_text: For your RCB-IPL SQL project, you mentioned writing complex queries. Can you describe the most complex query you wrote? What tables were involved, what specific question were you trying to answer, and what was the biggest challenge you faced in getting it to work correctly?
per_question.answer_text: तो सबसे complex query मुझे लगी पोती involved Identifying Players Who consistently perform across multiple season. सर तो उसके लिए मैंने tables यूज़ किए थे। जैसे कि matches, deliveries, players देखो। क्यूरी इनवर्ल्ड इज मल्टीपल जॉइंट। City Aggregate Functions, Window Function. हम्म For example नहीं के लिए Which player ranked in the top 10 run scores for at least 3 consecutive season? The biggest challenge was ensuring इंश्योरिंग correct Aggregation without duplicate containing Because deliveries data exist at ball level. I resolve this by carefully grouping data. Add the match and season level before applying ranking functions.
per_question.strengths: Complex query, multiple joins, aggregation functions
per_question.develop: Providing more specific details about the query, such as the exact SQL code used
per_question.fix: Practicing to clearly articulate the thought process and technical details of the query in English

per_question.question_text: Imagine you've built a dashboard for the sales team. How would you go about ensuring the data is accurate and that the team trusts the numbers they're seeing?
per_question.answer_text: ओ data की accuracy Court है तो और उस पर trust करने के लिए के लिए बहुत से factors हैं। That is validate source data with stakeholder. तर क्रॉस चेक डैशबोर्ड मैट्रिक्स अगेन रो डेटा। हाँ। Compare Dashboard वो total With existing reports. Test Calculations Using Sample Records परफॉर्म UAT। UAT मतलब User Acceptance Testing। Document KPI definitions clearly Schedule Periodic Data Validation Checks. Building Stakeholder Trust comes from transparency and consistent accuracy.
per_question.develop: specific data quality metrics, automation of validation checks
per_question.fix: provide concrete examples of data validation techniques and tools used

per_question.question_text: This role involves cleaning data from multiple sources. What are some of the most common data quality issues you've encountered or would expect to encounter?
per_question.answer_text: तो जो common issues है That is missing values and duplicate record. Incorrect data types, inconsistent format. मैं Example के लिए लिए तो dates। और time। Outliers, Null Values, Typographical Error, पर Unconsistent Naming Convention Invalid Entries For example कि मैंने internship के time I found vessel names recorded in multiple format like MV Ocean Star Ocean Star and m.v. Ocean Star. था। So Standardize this using Excel and Power Query before analyzing.
